items.title_en: Crypto treasury buying outpaces Bitcoin supply at 3-to-1
items.title_ur: Crypto treasury buying outpaces Bitcoin supply at 3-to-1
summary_en: Crypto treasury buying outpaces Bitcoin supply at 3-to-1
Corporate Bitcoin treasuries expanded by 260,000 BTC in six months, three times the amount mined, with Strategy holding 60% of all corporate holdings.
Watch market reaction and follow-up official updates.

summary_en: Rattled retail retreats to Bitcoin, Ether after October crash
Retail traders fled to Bitcoin and Ether after the October crypto crash last year, adding to an already tough year for altcoins.

items.title_en: Bitcoin climbs to two-month high of $96,240 as altcoins surge and shorts get squeezed
items.title_ur: Bitcoin climbs to two-month high of $96,240 as altcoins surge and shorts get squeezed
summary_en: Bitcoin climbs to two-month high of $96,240 as altcoins surge and shorts get squeezed
Bitcoin climbed above $96,000 for the first time since November, triggering over $500 million in liquidations as altcoins outperformed and traders rushed to cover bearish bets.
Watch market reaction and follow-up official updates.
